title: Evidence Claim (claim <= proof)
description: A single public claim classified as DOWOD | GAP | NARRACJA. Enforces: DOWOD needs proof_ref; GAP needs roadmap_ref and future phrasing; NARRACJA must be labelled.

proof_ref.description: Resolvable reference an independent party can re-run/inspect (URL, file+hash, commit, test id).

phrased_as_future.description: For GAP: the statement is worded as roadmap, not as done.

then.description: A DOWOD without a proof_ref is invalid — downgrade to GAP.
A GAP must carry a roadmap_ref and be phrased as future.
